- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested on mobile and desktop widths
- [ ] Verified in both light and dark themes
- [ ] No secrets or env values committed
